vocab.وشي ساح: my face melted (idiom: felt very hot)

vocab.عامل ازاي: how is it; what is it like
vocab.انبهرت: I was amazed; I was impressed

vocab.ما بعرفش: I can't; I don't know how

vocab.مش قد كده: not that much; not so much

vocab.يعني: it means; that is; I mean

vocab.بقى: so; then; now (discourse particle, often for emphasis or transition)
